rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of, And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment By Defendants On First Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, November 30, 2015, Line 1( Part 2 of 2). rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, November 30, 2015, Line 5. PLAINTIFF TYRONE YOUNGS Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff is taken OFF-CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per C.C.P. §§ 1005 and 1013. In addition, the request is moot because an Order Sustaining Demurrer with Leave to Amend was entered on Nov. 10, 2015. =(501/REQ)
